name: Master Baking Mix (Low Fat Bisquick Substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the 2 cups of enriched all-purpose flour, 1 cup of whole wheat flour, 1/4 cup of wheat germ, 2 tbsp of oat bran, 1/2 cup of nonfat dry milk powder, and 3/4 tsp of salt in a food processor using a metal blade. Alternatively, mix them together with an electric mixer.
2. Slowly add the 1/3 cup of canola oil to the mixture while the machine is running.
3. Scrape the sides of the bowl or processing container with a rubber spatula to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Mix the ingredients thoroughly once more.
5. Transfer the mix to a covered container and store it in the freezer.
Makes 5 cups of mix.
Use in recipes calling for Bisquick-type baking mix.
